raw_resume_text: Brandon M. DuBose Farmington Hills, MI 48335 | (313) 949-8543 | brandondubose2020@gmail.com Professional Summary Results-oriented Operations & Logistics Professional with over 5 years of experience leading teams in high-volume distribution environments. Proven track record at Amazon and Universal Logistics in optimizing workflows, improving safety cultures, and exceeding productivity KPIs. Skilled in data-driven decision-making, workforce management, and continuous process improvement. Seeking to leverage supervisory experience and operational expertise as an Operations Supervisor or Management Core Competencies Operations Management: Warehouse Operations, Inventory Control, Workflow Optimization, Logistics Coordination. Team Leadership: Workforce Planning, Performance Coaching, Conflict Resolution, Safety Compliance. Data & Technical: Advanced Excel (Pivot Tables, Data Analysis), Process Improvement (Lean/Kaizen), KPI Tracking. Professional Experience Universal Logistics Holdings Fleet Manager July 2025 – Present Supervise daily logistics operations, coordinating with drivers and customers; analytics-driven decisions; monitor fleet; implement corrective actions; cross-functional coordination. Charter Spectrum Field Technician II May 2025 – July 2025 Managed on-site technical operations including LAN/WAN installs and troubleshooting; customer support; inventory tracking; documentation. Amazon Fulfillment Process Assistant (Operations Team Lead) April 2020 – May 2025 Progressive leadership roles across Singles, Outbound Flow, Sort/Pack; workforce planning; coaching; productivity and quality improvements. Education Schoolcraft College Associate's Degree in Business Administration (In Progress) Expected Graduation December 2027. C-Tech Programs Telecommunications Certifications. High School Diploma 2020.
